name: Nathan Heaps
observations: Experience in devops, web engineering, agentic engineering
Preference: Never link to documentation that doesn't exist yet - create it first or use TODO comments instead (rule: .claude/rules/documentation-linking.md)

name: TOON
observations: Token-Oriented Object Notation - compact serialization format for LLM contexts
API: encode(obj) to serialize, decode(str) to parse
Uses YAML-like indentation for nested objects, CSV-style tabular layout for uniform arrays
Example tabular array format: users[3]{id,name,role}: followed by comma-separated rows

name: data-serialization-plugin
observations: Supports YAML, JSON, TOON, XML, HTML format conversions
Special handling for Playwright accessibility snapshots
Dependencies installed to .deps/ directory with PYTHONPATH setup

name: nsheaps/.ai claude-code-review workflow
observations: Uses interpolate-prompt action for env var substitution

name: stainless-api/stainless claude-code-review workflow
observations: PR #15127 contains improvements that were pulled into nsheaps/.ai
Either workflow may be newer than the other at any given time

name: litellm-proxy-plugin
observations: Auto-configures Claude Code to route through LiteLLM proxy on session start
Supports modes: auto, local, remote, gateway, disabled
Has 5 skills: setup-litellm, configure-providers, configure-observability, configure-remote-proxy, configure-claude-code
Uses safe-settings-write.sh shared lib for atomic settings updates
Supports Cloudflare AI Gateway, remote LiteLLM, local LiteLLM
SessionStart hook writes ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL and ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN to settings.local.json
